emails.subject: Re: deal 483759.01
emails.body: Re: deal 483759.01 This deal, along with three other options I entered yesterday, defaulted to AM when I changed the expiry frequency from Day to Month. It's been changed now. Thanks for the heads up. Kate Stephanie Piwetz 12/21/2000 08:06 AM
